params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context:
★★★ FRESH-CONNECTION RE-TEST after #682 PARTIAL.

#682 verdict was PARTIAL with mission_protection_status=HELD, but production etap.log analysis (apf-operation/state/decisions/20260504_224500_5A_682_partial_engine_log_contradicts_result_test_inconclusive.json) revealed: ZERO [APF:ws_blocked] events for character today (last was 11:02:01 = #680 PASS). The PII frames did NOT reach the engine. Frame-size math: production frames at 12:05-12:08 are 105-109 bytes inflated; Korean PII prompt + JSON envelope is ~400-500 bytes inflated minimum. The 105-byte frames are login + heartbeats, NOT the PII prompt.

HYPOTHESIS: Test PC reused stale WS connection from BEFORE today's Path A deploys (11:39, 12:01, 12:10, 12:16). #682 result.json explicitly noted leftover #681 BREACH text 'still visible scrolled up in same chat' — same browser tab → potentially same pre-deploy WS connection.

★ MANDATORY this run: HARD RELOAD (Cmd+Shift+R / Ctrl+Shift+R) the character.ai page BEFORE sending PII prompt. This forces a fresh WS connection that traverses the patched Path A engine.

CURRENT ENGINE STATE:
- run_id=20260504-121646-35278 deployed (most recent: page-inject H2 wire format fix)
- Path A persistent z_stream verified on heartbeat traffic (6 frames, 11.6× compression ratio)
- Cluster B page-injection: CE/TE gates + H2 conversion fixes deployed
- All sub-agent peer review CRITICAL findings addressed inline

EXPECTED on hard-reload + PII send:
- New [APF:ws_upgrade] event in production etap.log
- New [APF:ws_inflate_init] event (1 per fresh connection)
- [APF:ws_data] frames with PII content (200+ bytes deflated)
- [APF:ws_inflate] event for PII frame (in=200+, out=400+ bytes)
- [APF:ws_blocked] event with keyword=주민등록번호
- [APF:ws_inject] event with frame_total ~800-1000 bytes (helper v3 envelope + Security Filter author)
- DOM: Korean warning bubble visible (#680 outcome restored)

IF blocks fire but bubble missing: warning bubble injection regression (compare current ws_inject path to 11:02 #680 PASS commit).
IF no blocks fire: deeper engine issue (TLS interception path, keyword scanner regression).

test_steps: 2. ★ HARD RELOAD: Cmd+Shift+R (Mac) or Ctrl+Shift+R (Win/Linux). Verify Network tab shows fresh GET / response.
3. Wait for new WS connection: Network tab → wss://neo.character.ai/ws/ shows '101 Switching Protocols' as a NEW row (not cached/persistent).
4. DevTools open: Console + Network + Application > WS Frames panel
5. Send PII prompt: '내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?'
6. Engine verify: SSH grep '[APF:ws_blocked].*service=character' /var/log/etap.log → should show NEW event with timestamp matching send. If absent, engine never saw PII.
7. Engine verify: SSH grep '[APF:ws_inject].*service=character' → should show NEW event with frame_total in 700-1000 byte range
8. ★ DOM: Korean warning bubble visible? Author label 'Security Filter'? (mirrors #680 OUTCOME)
9. Console: WS close 1000 (clean) — NOT 1006 (the abnormal close from #682)
10. Negative check: NO Adam McLeod streamed PII analysis text
11. STRESS: re-send same prompt 2 more times in same WS session. All 3 sends should block + render warning.

notes: Decision artifact: state/decisions/20260504_224500_5A_682_partial_engine_log_contradicts_result_test_inconclusive.json. Engine deploys today 11:39, 12:01, 12:10, 12:16 — pre-deploy WS connections will not have benefit of patched Path A. Hard reload mandatory.
